description: Phase 37: QuantWork - Enterprise Suite App. Create apps/quantwork/ with project management, OKRs, sprint boards, time tracking, HR features, enterprise security (SAML/SCIM/DLP), and team analytics.
steps: Create apps/quantwork/package.json with deps: @quant/common, @quant/auth, @quant/server-core, @quant/ai, @quant/realtime, fastify, zod, ioredis. Create apps/quantwork/tsconfig.json.
Create apps/quantwork/backend/app.ts following createApp pattern with routes for projects, hr, security, analytics

Create apps/quantwork/backend/services/project.service.ts - ProjectManagementService class: createProject, createSprint, addTask, assignTask, updateTaskStatus, getKanbanBoard, getGanttChart, trackTime, getProjectMetrics
Create apps/quantwork/backend/services/okr.service.ts - OKRService class: createObjective, addKeyResult, updateProgress, getAlignment, getOKRTree, scoreKeyResult, closeOKRCycle

Create apps/quantwork/backend/services/hr.service.ts - HRService class: getOrgChart, requestLeave, approveLeave, createReview, submitReview, createJobPosting, trackCandidate, scheduleInterview, onboardEmployee

Create apps/quantwork/backend/services/enterprise-security.service.ts - EnterpriseSecurityService class: configureSAML, configureSCIM, provisionUser, deprovisionUser, getAuditLog, setDLPPolicy, checkDLPCompliance, enforcePolicy

Create apps/quantwork/backend/services/team-analytics.service.ts - TeamAnalyticsService class: getProductivity, getResourceAllocation, generateReport, getTeamVelocity, getBurndownChart, getCustomReport
Create apps/quantwork/backend/routes/projects.ts, routes/hr.ts, routes/security.ts, routes/analytics.ts - Fastify route handlers
Create apps/quantwork/backend/__tests__/project.service.test.ts - Tests for sprint management, task workflow, time tracking
Create apps/quantwork/backend/__tests__/enterprise-security.service.test.ts - Tests for SAML config, SCIM provisioning, DLP policies
Create apps/quantwork/backend/__tests__/hr.service.test.ts - Tests for leave management, review cycles, hiring pipeline
acceptance_criteria: apps/quantwork/ directory exists with proper package.json and tsconfig.json
ProjectManagementService handles sprints, tasks, and kanban boards
OKRService tracks objectives and key results with alignment
HRService provides org chart, leave, reviews, and hiring
EnterpriseSecurityService integrates SAML SSO and SCIM provisioning
TeamAnalyticsService generates productivity and resource reports
All services use zod for validation
Unit tests pass for project, security, and HR services
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && npx vitest run apps/quantwork/backend/__tests__/ --passWithNoTests
